name: Apricot-Cream Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped dried apricots and water in a small saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Cover and reduce the heat, then simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Drain well and set aside.
5. Beat the cream cheese with an electric mixer until smooth and fluffy.
6. Stir in the drained apricots and remaining ingredients (orange marmalade, milk, and pecans).
7. Serve on crackers or enjoy on an English muffin or bagel.
Yield: Approximately 3 and 1/2 cups.
